name: Extra Special Sour Cream Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine sour cream, onion and mushrooms.
3. In a large bowl, combine remaining ingredients; mix well. Shape meat mixture into long 4 inch wide rectangle in ungreased shallow baking dish.
4. Indent to make a 2 inch deep well, lengthwise, down center of loaf.
5. Carefully spoon sour cream mixture into well.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1/1 1/4 hours.
7. Let stand 10 minutes before slicing.
Makes 8-9 servings.
